---
title: "Dr. Webster\'s complete dictionary of the English Language thoroughly revised and improved, by Chauncey A. Goodrich and Noah Porter"
---

## Dr. Webster\'s complete dictionary of the English Language thoroughly revised and improved, by Chauncey A. Goodrich and Noah Porter

**Author:** Noah Webster
**Date:** 1864
**Imprint:** London: Bell and Daldy

### Notes

CMY states (1900) that this was the edition she used.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
